description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Build that runs on push to specific paths and on workflow dispatch. The workflow has multiple jobs: configure, buildLinux, buildWindows, and cleanLinux. The configure job checks out code, configures components using a Python script, and outputs matrices for Linux and Windows. The buildLinux and buildWindows jobs use these matrices to build and test on respective platforms, with various steps including checkout, build, test, and artifact upload. The cleanLinux job cleans up the Linux VM.
